name: CLI Task Manager
description: Build a command-line task management application with local storage
prompt:
Create a CLI task manager application in Go using Cobra:

1. Commands:
   - task add "description" [--priority high|medium|low] [--due YYYY-MM-DD]
   - task list [--status all|pending|done] [--priority high|medium|low]
   - task show <id>
   - task complete <id>
   - task delete <id>
   - task update <id> [--description "..."] [--priority ...] [--due ...]

2. Features:
   - Task persistence using JSON or SQLite
   - Task attributes: ID, Description, Priority, Status, DueDate, CreatedAt, CompletedAt
   - Colored output for better UX
   - Table formatting for list view
   - Search/filter capabilities
   - Statistics (task count by status/priority)

3. Requirements:
   - Use Cobra framework
   - Proper error handling
   - Help text for all commands
   - Input validation
   - Unit tests for all commands
   - README with usage examples
   - Build script or Makefile

4. Quality:
   - Clean code structure
   - No placeholders
   - Proper package organization
   - Edge case handling
   - Cross-platform compatibility (Linux, macOS, Windows)
